overview: UR Comics is a full-scale, production-ready comic platform designed to rival top platforms like Webtoon. It features a premium purple glassmorphism design, vertical scroll reader, creator upload system with professional image stitching, hidden owner panel, community engagement features, and a coin-based monetization system — all optimized for mobile and desktop.
features: Homepage with hero banner, genre explorer, trending, and continue reading
Vertical scroll comic reader with auto-saved position
Creator upload system with image stitching modal for manhwa chapters
Drag-and-drop image reordering and canvas-based vertical stitching
Auto-upload stitched chapters and download option
Hidden owner panel with stealth mode and priority placement
Coin shop simulation with premium chapter unlocking
Community features: likes, bookmarks, comments, follow creators
FAQ page with upvoting and admin management panel
Empty state handling — real-data only, no fake comics
